name: Sharpshooter
description: During the Determine Cover step, a unit with the Sharpshooter X keyword subtracts X from the numerical value of the defender’s Cover. For example, a unit with heavy Cover and 1 Suppression token that is attacked by a unit with Sharpshooter 1 has light Cover.
official_rules_text: During the Determine Cover step, a unit with the Sharpshooter X keyword subtracts X from the numerical value of the defender’s Cover. For example, a unit with heavy Cover and 1 Suppression token that is attacked by a unit with Sharpshooter 1 has light Cover.
